title: Invalid input error when updating HubSpot property
symptom: When attempting to update a HubSpot property using an HTTP request, the user receives a 'bad request / format is incorrect' error.
applies_when: Updating a custom property in HubSpot
not_this_if: Using the HubSpot Update node with default properties
root_cause: The error occurs because the JSON body format is incorrect. Specifically, the properties object must be structured properly, and certain required fields may be missing or incorrectly formatted.
fix_steps: Ensure the JSON body is correctly formatted, including all required fields.
Add 'hasUniqueValue': true to the JSON request body if necessary.
Refer to the HubSpot API documentation for the correct structure.
agent_instruction: Correct the JSON body format and include 'hasUniqueValue': true if needed.
